extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Data Manager or arguments configuration panel in UiPath Studio Web for a conversational agent or automation component. The Inputs and Outputs sections are expanded, showing an input argument named in_DaysAgo configured as In/Number with default value 30, and an output argument named out_Invoices configured as Out/Text. The highlighted fields emphasize the argument names and their description text.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Inputs section, create or select the argument named "in_DaysAgo".
2. Set the Direction field to "In".
3. Set the Type field to "Number".
4. In the Default value field, enter "30".
5. In the Description field, enter a description beginning with "Filter Invoices created in_DaysAgo or la...".
6. Enable the "Required" checkbox.
7. In the Outputs section, create or select the argument named "out_Invoices".
8. Set the Direction field to "Out".
9. Set the Type field to "Text".
10. In the Description field, enter "Invoice JSON file".
